tracks.meaning: a precise location in space defined by coordinates, having no dimensions

the act of scoring in games like rugby or American football by carrying the ball over the goal line
to direct or aim something toward a target or objective
the essential idea or main purpose of what someone is saying

a promontory or cape of land projecting into a body of water

an instance of the attacking team being awarded a free kick or penalty in certain sports
a discrete unit of data or information in a system or database
a small dot or spot on a surface

a sharp protrusion on a bone or body structure

a dot placed after a note to increase its duration by half
a full stop or period mark in punctuation

a specific location or position that is militarily significant
the result of a single wager or the score achieved in a round
